name: calculate_sip
description: Calculates the future value of a SIP (monthly investment) or lump sum with compound interest. Returns total corpus, wealth gained, return multiple, and pessimistic/base/optimistic scenarios at ±2% return rates.

monthly_amount.description: Monthly SIP investment amount in INR. Use 0 if this is a lump sum only calculation.

expected_annual_return_pct.description: Expected annual return percentage (e.g. 12 for 12%). Use 10-12 for equity MFs, 7-8 for debt, 6-7 for FDs.

existing_lumpsum.description: Optional one-time lump sum amount in INR invested today. Defaults to 0.
